front.title: Considerations for Assigning a new Recommended DiffServ Codepoint (DSCP)

abstract.t: This document discusses considerations for assigning a new recommended DiffServ Code Point (DSCP) for a new standard Per Hop Behavior (PHB). It considers the common observed re-marking behaviors that the DiffServ field might be subjected to along an Internet path. It also notes some implications of using a specific DSCP.
